description:
A small Bureau contract: clear a goblin sighting in the wardstone woods. One or two goblins, fast and tricksy. No story. Just a fight. Leave-mission button returns the player to Vask for the payout.

Triggers:
1. mission_intro (aigm): woodland setting, two goblins ahead.
2. mission_done (set_flag): on last enemy death, flips `mission_complete=true`, clears `mission_pending`.
3. mission_done_aigm: pairs with the flag to nudge the player toward LEAVE MISSION.
customIntroduction: The wardstone wood is older than the station and the wardstone at its centre is older than the Empire. Mossy roof of branches, no path that lasts more than a hundred paces. You hear them before you see them — chittering low to each other in their hissed scrap of trade tongue. Two goblins, scouting line, weapons drawn.
customContext: GOBLIN MISSION — SIMPLE CONTRACT FIGHT. Two goblins, hostile, will use Nimble Escape to skirmish. No parley, no reinforcements, no second wave. Player completes when both are dead.
objective: Defeat the goblins. Return to Vask.

then.message: Open in the wardstone wood. Two goblins ahead, low chittering. One short paragraph, then the fight starts.
Contract complete. Return to Vask to turn it in.
Goblins down. Wood is quiet. One-line cleanup beat, then point the player at the LEAVE MISSION button to return to Vask.
